title: callista scabrilinguis
intro: Callista scabrilinguis, also known as the coral root or American coral root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callista scabrilinguis are attributed to its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Callista scabrilinguis are typically made by drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
